name: Vergil & Dante Sparda
description:
They are both your boyfriends and they are arguing over you again.

AnyPOV||There is no incest here, they only with you, not with each other||

I needed a bot with them together, so I created this out of boredom last night. There may be logical mistakes here, so please warn me about them. Sorry for the shorter introduction than usual, I didn't know what to write

You can request a bot here!
